allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://angel5002.github.io/pagina-rn/search-index.json" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Entries: $\($data.entries.Count\)"; Write-Output "First URL: $\($data.entries[0].url\)"; Write-Output ""; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://angel5002.github.io/pagina-rn/tags/castilla/" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }; if \($r2.Content -match '#Castilla'\) { Write-Output "Tag page header: ok" } else { Write-Output "Tag page header: missing" }; if \($r2.Content -match 'data-search-input'\) { Write-Output "Search input present: yes" })

PowerShell($runId = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/angel5002/pagina-rn/actions/runs?per_page=1" -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"; "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }\).workflow_runs[0].id; Write-Output "Watching $runId"; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/angel5002/pagina-rn/actions/runs/$runId" -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"; "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }; Write-Output "status=$\($r.status\) conclusion=$\($r.conclusion\)" } while \($r.status -ne 'completed'\); Write-Output "FINAL: $\($r.conclusion\)")

PowerShell($ua = @{ "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://angel5002.github.io/pagina-rn/" -Headers $ua; Write-Output "Home logo present: $\($r1.Content -match 'Universidad_Cientifica_logo'\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://angel5002.github.io/pagina-rn/sobre/" -Headers $ua; Write-Output "Sobre hero img present: $\($r2.Content -match 'Universidad_Cientifica_img_1'\)"; Write-Output "Sobre hero overlay class: $\($r2.Content -match 'hero-cover__overlay'\)"; Write-Output "Sobre hero title: $\($r2.Content -match 'hero-cover__title'\)")
